selected_topic: First-ever dinosaur fossil discovered in Antarctica
news_angle: Discovery of the first dinosaur fossil in Antarctica reveals its identity as a titanosaur, expanding knowledge of prehistoric life on the continent.
why_this_is_news: This finding represents a significant paleontological milestone, opening new insights into dinosaur distribution and prehistoric Antarctic ecosystems.
specific_action: was discovered in Antarctica for the first time
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao as a daring explorer cat clad in snow gear, holding a dinosaur bone with excitement against a dramatic icy Antarctic backdrop featuring mountain-like ice formations and a faint silhouette of a titanosaur skeleton looming behind
image_prompt: A dynamic animated orange tabby cat with athletic build, sharp tabby markings, fluffy cheek fur, and confident mischievous smile wearing stylish snow explorer gear (parka, cap, goggles). The cat holds a large, ancient dinosaur bone while standing on icy Antarctic terrain. The background shows rugged icy mountains and a ghostly titanosaur skeleton silhouette in the ice. The style is cinematic anime with vibrant colors and dynamic poses emphasizing adventure and discovery.
easter_eggs: Hunk Mao’s goggles reflecting tiny dinosaur footprints
Ancient map with paw prints marked Antarctica on the explorer’s jacket patch
Snowflakes shaped faintly like dinosaur bones
caption: Scientists uncovered the first dinosaur fossil ever found in Antarctica, identifying it as a titanosaur. Hunk Mao’s ready to chill with this prehistoric heavyweight in the coolest lab on Earth!
risk_notes: Ensure the Antarctic and dinosaur imagery avoids typical generic generic or touristy tropes; keep the cat character consistent with brand style.
